top3.sql: SELECT artist FROM cards WHERE artist IN ('Jeremy Jarvis', 'Aaron Miller', 'Chippy') AND id IN (SELECT id FROM cards WHERE setCode = 'Coldsnap');
SELECT artist FROM cards WHERE artist IN ('Jeremy Jarvis', 'Aaron Miller', 'Chippy') AND id IN (SELECT id FROM cards WHERE setCode = 'Coldsnap');

SELECT DISTINCT artist 
FROM cards 
WHERE artist IN ('Jeremy Jarvis', 'Aaron Miller', 'Chippy') 
  AND uuid IN (SELECT uuid FROM cards WHERE setCode = 'Coldsnap');
SELECT artist FROM cards WHERE artist IN ('Jeremy Jarvis', 'Aaron Miller', 'Chippy') AND id IN (SELECT id FROM cards WHERE setCode = 'Coldsnap');

SELECT DISTINCT artist 
FROM cards 
WHERE artist IN ('Jeremy Jarvis', 'Aaron Miller', 'Chippy') 
  AND setCode = 'Coldsnap';

final.sql: SELECT artist FROM cards WHERE artist IN ('Jeremy Jarvis', 'Aaron Miller', 'Chippy') AND id IN (SELECT id FROM cards WHERE setCode = 'Coldsnap');
